scripts.build: mkdir -p public/models && bun build web/app-entry.tsx --outfile web/app.js && bun build web/model-viewer-entry.ts --outfile web/model-viewer.js && cp web/index.html public/index.html && cp web/styles.css public/styles.css && cp web/app.js public/app.js && cp web/model-viewer.js public/model-viewer.js && cp web/models/scene.glb public/models/scene.glb && cp web/models/sphere.glb public/models/sphere.glb
